prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. The shooting down of Malaysia Airlines Flight 17 (MH17/MAS17) over eastern Ukraine on 17 July 2014 resulted in the deaths of 283 passengers and 15 crew members. The aircraft, a Boeing 777-200ER, was lost contact at a distance of 50 km from the Ukraine-Russia border, while the wreckage fell near Hrabove in Donetsk Oblast, Ukraine, about 40 km from the border. The investigation was delegated to the Dutch Safety Board (DSB) and the Dutch-led investigation team (JIT, which investigated
B. Malaysia Airlines Flight 17, also known as MH17 or MAS17, was a regularly scheduled passenger air service operating between Amsterdam and Kuala Lumpur. On July 17, 2014, this flight was brought down by Russian-controlled forces as it traversed eastern Ukraine. The incident resulted in the fatalities of all 283 passengers and 15 crew members aboard the aircraft. Communication with the Boeing 777-200ER ceased when it was approximately 50 kilometers (31 miles) away from the boundary between Ukraine and Russia. Debris from the aircraft subsequently landed near Hrabove in Ukraine's Donetsk Oblast, situated 40 kilometers (25 miles) from the border. This tragic event transpired amidst the conflict in Donbas, specifically over an area under the command of Russian separatist factions. The Dutch Safety Board (DSB) was entrusted with the primary investigative duties, alongside the Dutch-led joint investigation team (JIT). In 2016, their findings indicated that a Buk surface-to-air missile was responsible for bringing down the airliner.
C. Malaysia Airlines Flight 17 (MH17/MAS17) was a scheduled passenger flight from Amsterdam to Kuala Lumpur that was shot down by Russian-controlled forces on 17 July 2014, while flying over eastern Ukraine. All 283 passengers and 15 crew were killed. Contact with the aircraft, a Boeing 777-200ER, was lost when it was about 50 km (31 mi) from the Ukraine–Russia border, and wreckage from the aircraft fell near Hrabove in Donetsk Oblast, Ukraine, 40 km (25 mi) from the border. The shoot-down occurred during the war in Donbas over territory controlled by Russian separatist forces.The responsibility for investigation was delegated to the Dutch Safety Board (DSB) and the Dutch-led joint investigation team (JIT), who in 2016 reported that the airliner had been downed by a Buk surface-to-air missile launched

Answer:
